div.p: Key Insight: The memory barrier establishes a happens-before relationship. Without it, the kernel may see a valid tail index pointing to uninitialized SQE data—a race condition that triggers corruption under high concurrency.

g.text: Race: Compiler/CPU may reorder tail update before SQE data
Safe: Store-release ensures SQE visibility before tail update

text.tspan: // 2. SQE fields still in store buffer
// 2. SQE fields still in store buffer
